recommendations.title: Meet the Malawas
recommendations.overview: A news anchor, a comedian, an actress, and a soccer player with big egos have to travel across the globe to meet the Malawa tribe for a TV show.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Fearless gunslinger, Lucky Luke, is ordered by the President to bring peace to Daisy Town.

recommendations.title: Brice 3
recommendations.overview: Brice is back. The world has changed, but not him. When his best friend, Marius, calls for help, he goes on a wild adventure that will lead him to the other side of the world... Travel shapes youth but will he remain the king of the "casse" ?

recommendations.title: Still Alice
recommendations.overview: Alice Howland, happily married with three grown children, is a renowned linguistics professor who starts to forget words. When she receives a devastating diagnosis, Alice and her family find their bonds tested.

recommendations.title: An Ordinary Case
recommendations.overview: Jean Monier is a disillusioned lawyer, appointed to defend Nicolas Milik, a man accused of murdering his wife. While everything points to his guilt, Monier takes up the case, convinced of his innocence.

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A poor construction worker, who struggles to keep his son in private school, mistakes an orb he finds in a junkjard for a toy which proves to be much, much more once the young boy starts to play with it.
